title: Ethics Committees Clinical Research Ethics Committee Application Fees
content:
Ethics Committees Clinical Research Ethics Committee Application Fees

Üsküdar University Clinical Research Ethics Committee does not charge an evaluation fee from application files in cases where at least one of the researchers is a member of Üsküdar University.

Other applications are accepted and the following fees are charged.

In Phase I / II / III / IV research and BE / BY research, even if the principal investigator is a member of Üsküdar University, the fees listed below are charged.

Application Fees: 2018

Phase I, II, III- Initial Application for Clinical Trial of Pharmaceutical Medicinal and Biological Products and Herbal Products (Except for Specialization Theses or Academic Purposes)

2.663,96
